pageContext.name: Vegeta
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Vegeta, from the newest anime show Dragon Ball Super Hero!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Vegeta from the new respective anime. Standing at approximately 9.4' tall, Vegeta is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho and Dragon Ball figures!
